main.name: Yi Li
main.description: Finance, Software System Engineering, Project Management
main.bio: My name is Yi Li, a UTS student of Software System Engineering. My bechlor's degree was finance. I have interests in all things related xsxsto the Fintech. I graduated from the University of Sydney with a Master of Project Management degree in 2023. Since then, I live in Sydney.
